EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Contract Offer AGENCY
EmailTemplate.subject: Alliance Rural & Remote Health - Contract Offer for FACILITY - NURSE NAME - START DATE - END DATE
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
CONTRACT OFFER FOR REVIEW.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
We're excited to offer you the following contract:
[Contract details]
Please review the below details carefully and let us know if you're happy to proceed:
[Travell details on offer] [Accomodation details on offer] [Pay offered] [Allowances included in offer] [Work schedule] [Other conditions]
Please also review the following documents before accepting the contract on offer:
[BFIPOL - Canecllation and refunds] [BFIPOL - Travel Nurses] [SREFRM - Contract offer condistions]
If you have any questions at all you can always call us on 07 4998 5550.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
